description.value: When you touch an undead creature, you channel negative energy that heals 1d8 points of damage + 1 point per caster level (maximum +5). This spell has no effect on living creatures, except those that are healed by negative energy are also healed by the spell. Repair Undead, Mass This spell functions as repair undead, except as noted above, and it cures 1d8 points of damage + 1 point per caster level (maximum +20) on each selected creature.
